arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher claims Trent Alexander-Arnold can delay Real Madrid decision beyond 2025
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to step up their transfer push for Trent Alexander-Arnold at the start of 2025. Alexander-Arnold is out of contract at Liverpool at the end of the 2024/25 season with talks on an extension ongoing. arts.sum: Mackenzie Kinsella, 15, had travelled from Australia to watch Saturday’s game against Liverpool but Storm Darragh forced the game to be postponed

arts.ttl: Report: Latest update has emerged on Mohamed Salah’s contract talks at Liverpool
arts.sum: Apart from recognition for their brilliant form this season, most of the talk surrounding Liverpool this season is about the contract situation of their players. The Reds are currently involved in contract talks with three of their most important players; Mohamed Salah, Virgil Van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold. arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are one of nine teams who are running the rule over LA Galaxy winger Gabriel Pec, according to a report.
